notes: H_16 CANARY (optional): Auto-Answer suppresses the incoming-call Accept/Decline popup when it will take the call, plus Account Modification Lockout - only the account Name is editable; changing any other field (Username/Password/Server/Protocol/Trunk/Save-Password) requires the administrator override password at Save. Installer preserves client_accounts.conf. mandatory:false so the fleet is NOT force-upgraded - canary agents only.
